description: Cross-language consistency fixture for the harness post-compaction verify->retry->warn loop (issue #46). Each case drives the loop with a scripted verifier whose per-attempt verdict is read from `verdicts` (one entry consumed per compaction turn; if the loop needs more turns than entries, the last entry repeats). `max_compaction_attempts` caps the number of compaction turns; the harness clamps it to a minimum of 1. The loop accepts the first passing summary, otherwise injects the missing items and retries, and after the cap is reached it emits exactly one warn-level CompactionVerificationFailed{missing_items, accepted_anyway:true} event and accepts the summary anyway (apply_compaction always runs once at the end). The injected retry message is `Your summary is missing these items: {missing joined by ', '}. Please revise.` This fixture isolates loop control flow from KeyTermVerifier term-extraction (see fixtures/compaction_verifier). ASCII only.
